metadata.description: Coding prompts categorized by required model thinking complexity

tiers.small: Simple, direct tasks: syntax lookup, short snippets, boilerplate, formatting, one-step transformations
tiers.medium: Multi-step reasoning: debugging, design patterns, moderate algorithms, integration tasks, refactoring
tiers.high: Deep reasoning: architecture design, complex algorithms, security audits, performance optimization, novel problem solving

high: Design a distributed task scheduling system that handles failover, deduplication, and exactly-once execution across multiple nodes.
Architect a multi-tenant SaaS platform with tenant isolation at the database, API, and infrastructure layers. Provide schemas, middleware, and deployment strategy.
Implement a CRDT-based collaborative text editor that handles concurrent edits without a central server.
Design and implement a query optimizer for a simple SQL engine that handles joins, indexes, and cost-based plan selection.
Audit this authentication system for security vulnerabilities and provide a hardened implementation with OWASP Top 10 mitigations.

Design a real-time fraud detection pipeline that processes millions of transactions per second with sub-100ms latency.

Implement a time-series database storage engine optimized for write-heavy IoT workloads with compression.

Design a secure secret management system with encryption at rest, access control, audit logging, and automatic rotation.
Implement a virtual machine with instruction set, stack management, closures, and garbage collection for a bytecode language.
Design a high-availability message broker that guarantees ordering, deduplication, and at-least-once delivery across partitions.
Implement a B+ tree with concurrent access support, page splitting, and disk-based persistence in Go.
Design a complete observability platform architecture with distributed tracing, metrics aggregation, and log correlation.
Implement a protocol buffer-like serialization framework with schema evolution, backward compatibility, and code generation.
Design a rate limiting system for a multi-service API gateway that handles distributed state, burst allowance, and tiered quotas.
Implement a transactional key-value store with MVCC, snapshot isolation, and write-ahead logging.
Design a blue-green deployment system for a microservices architecture with database migration coordination.
Implement a WebAssembly runtime that handles module loading, memory management, and host function binding.
Design a data lake architecture with schema evolution, partitioning strategy, and query optimization for petabyte-scale analytics.

Implement a coroutine scheduler with work-stealing, cooperative yielding, and I/O multiplexing in C++.
Design a comprehensive disaster recovery plan for a cloud-native application with RPO < 1 minute and RTO < 5 minutes.
Implement a differential dataflow engine for incremental computation over changing datasets.
Design a federated GraphQL gateway that handles schema stitching, authorization, caching, and query planning across services.
Implement a software transactional memory system in Haskell with optimistic concurrency and conflict detection.
Design a compliant audit logging system for a financial platform that handles immutability, search, retention, and tamper detection.
Implement a type inference engine using Hindley-Milner algorithm with let-polymorphism and type classes.
Design a horizontally scalable search engine architecture with inverted indexes, ranking, and real-time indexing.
Implement a custom TCP congestion control algorithm and benchmark it against Reno and CUBIC.
Design a multi-cloud Terraform architecture with state management, drift detection, and cost optimization.
Implement a persistent data structure library with immutable vectors, maps, and sets using structural sharing.
